author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-kernel audit complete. 6 of 8 sklearn estimators present (75%); only AdditiveChi2Sampler, PolynomialCountSketch, SkewedChi2Sampler missing (all kernel_approximation feature mappers — filed as #293).

Sub-issues closed in this pass:
- #289 score() on FittedKernelRidge (R²), FittedGaussianProcessRegressor (R²), FittedGaussianProcessClassifier (mean accuracy)
- #290 predict_log_proba on FittedGaussianProcessClassifier
- #291 sample_y(x, n_samples, random_state) on FittedGaussianProcessRegressor — full posterior covariance + Cholesky + Xoshiro256Plus seedable draws
- #292 proof-of-API integration test (10 tests covering KernelRidge, Nystroem, RBFSampler, GP regressor + classifier, full GP kernel zoo, NW + LocalPoly with full local-kernel zoo, bandwidth helpers, diagnostics)

Filed during audit (deferred):
- #293 AdditiveChi2Sampler / PolynomialCountSketch / SkewedChi2Sampler

Existing related issues (deferred to their own work):
- #114 KernelCenterer (could land here or in ferrolearn-preprocess)

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- NadarayaWatson + LocalPolynomialRegression (sklearn has no direct equivalent)
- CrossValidatedBandwidth + scott/silverman helpers
- Heteroscedasticity tests (White, Breusch-Pagan, Goldfeld-Quandt, Dette-Munk-Wagner)
- Wild bootstrap CIs / Fan-Yao variance estimation / conformal calibration
- Full local-kernel trait family (Gaussian, Epanechnikov, Tricube, Biweight, Triweight, Uniform, Cosine)
- GaussianProcessRegressor.sample_y is sklearn-equivalent but BayesianGaussianMixture also got bic/aic in #279 — analogous extras across the workspace

Verification: 232 tests pass (192 unit + 7 oracle + 6 proptest + 10 api_proof + 5 adversarial + 7 accuracy_comparison + 5 doctest). Zero regressions.
